goal: Build a compact pick-and-place cell that fits within a 2×2 m footprint (xy bounded by [-1, 1] × [-1, 1]). Single Franka Panda on a 1x1x0.75m table picks 5cm cubes from a 1.6m conveyor and drops them in a 0.3x0.3m bin behind the robot. The CONSTRAINT-01 task uses this canonical: same delivery mechanics as CP-01, smaller dimensions, footprint-bounded.
thoughts:
Six compact-layout specifics for CP-04 (extends CP-01 — orientation rule, CPU dynamics, sleepThreshold, rubber-on-cube, target_source='curobo' all inherited):
1) Table scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375] gives 1×1×0.75 m table (vs CP-01's 2×1×0.75). Bbox xy: [-0.5, -0.25]→[0.5, 0.25]. Fits in [-1, 1].
2) Conveyor size=[1.6, 0.3, 0.05] at position=[0, 0.4, 0.78]. Bbox xy: [-0.8, 0.25]→[0.8, 0.55]. Half the length of CP-01's conveyor — keeps within bound while still letting cubes drift visibly.
3) Cubes at x=[-0.75, -0.6, -0.45, -0.3], y=0.4. Start outside Franka's 0.70m reach (|x|>0.575 when y=0.4) so belt has visible work; cubes 1-4 are in increasing reach. Bbox xy stays within [-0.775, 0.375]→[-0.275, 0.425]. Fits.
4) Bin at position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15]. Bbox xy: [-0.15, -0.55]→[0.15, -0.25]. Fits.
5) Robot orientation [0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068] (90° around Z) — same rule as CP-01: cube/belt at world +Y is in robot's natural +X base direction.
6) verify_pickplace_pipeline accepts footprint_bounds=[[-1,-1],[1,1]] — every authored prim's xy world bbox must fit. Catches layouts that drift outside the constraint without changing the build pattern.
code:
# DomeLight — without this the viewport renders black after new_stage()
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

# Parent Xform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Table — 1x1x0.75m (half the CP-01 footprint)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# CPU dynamics for PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Franka centered, oriented for cube pickup at +Y direction
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Compact conveyor — 1.6m wide (vs CP-01's 3m) — bbox xy stays in [-1, 1]
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[1.6, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Cubes start outside reach, closer-spaced than CP-01
for i, x in enumerate([-0.75, -0.6, -0.45, -0.3]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

# sleepThreshold=0
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# Rubber on cubes only (CP-01 pattern)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Bin behind robot — same dimensions as CP-01
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Sensor inside reach
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# cuRobo controller
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
code_template:
# DomeLight
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

# Parent Xform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Compact table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Primary robot
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# Input conveyor (compact)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Workpieces
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Destination bin
create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

# Pick sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# cuRobo controller
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
extension_notes: CP-04 reuses CP-01's pick-place mechanics (cuRobo controller, settling state, mid-waypoints, friction material, sleepThreshold=0) but compacts the geometry to fit a 2×2 m footprint constraint. Verify with footprint_bounds=[[-1,-1],[1,1]] catches any layout that drifts outside.
failure_modes: Conveyor size too long — exceeds [-1, 1] x bound. Use 1.6m max.
Cubes spaced too tight — controller picks them too quickly to see belt motion. Keep ~0.15m spacing.
Closest cube starts within Franka's 0.70m reach → controller pauses belt immediately on tick 1, never resumes between picks. Keep first cube at |x| > 0.575 when y=0.4.
Bin pushed too far in -y — exceeds [-1, 1] y bound. Position [0, -0.4, 0.75] is already at edge; don't push further.
Skipping footprint_bounds in verify_args — verifier won't catch out-of-bound prims and the constraint is silently violated.
Inheriting CP-01's verify_args verbatim (footprint_bounds=null) negates the whole point of CP-04 vs CP-01.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s too short. cube_final=(0.00, -0.45, 0.835) in Bin)
